title: Fix wrong default timeout value in HTTP client
description: The HTTP client had a default timeout of 0 seconds, which effectively meant no timeout. Changed to 30 seconds as documented in the API contract.
diff:
diff --git a/clients/http_client.py b/clients/http_client.py
index 5f6a7b8..c9d0e1f 100644
--- a/clients/http_client.py
+++ b/clients/http_client.py
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ import requests
 
 class HttpClient:
 
-    def __init__(self, base_url: str, timeout: int = 0):
+    def __init__(self, base_url: str, timeout: int = 30):
         '''Initialize HTTP client.
 
         Args:
comments: amit: The docs say 30s default but the code had 0. Good fix.
bella: Approve, this was causing intermittent hangs in prod.
author: charlie
